constraints.name: avoid_any_type
constraints.description: Avoid using 'any' type - prefer specific types for type safety

constraints.name: error_handling
constraints.description: Functions should include proper error handling (try/catch or Result types)

constraints.name: typed_functions
constraints.description: Functions should have explicit return type annotations

constraints.name: input_validation
constraints.description: User inputs must be validated before processing

constraints.name: module_exports
constraints.description: Modules should have clear export boundaries
